description: M64 registered runtime-effect contract. Rows are materialized from registered runtime-effect evidence and do not claim arbitrary SkSL compilation or unregistered effect approximation.
outputDescription: M64 registered runtime-effect generated dashboard rows materialized from descriptor-backed runtime-effect support matrix evidence and explicit arbitrary-SkSL refusal policy.

scenes.title: M64 SimpleRT descriptor-backed shader
scenes.pipelineKey: runtimeEffect=SimpleRT descriptor=runtime_simple_rt.wgsl parserReflected=true uniforms=gColor@0 state=[blendMode=kSrcOver] milestone=M64

gpuRouteDetails.parserEvidence: RuntimeEffectDescriptorWebGpuTest#runtime SimpleRT descriptor WGSL parses and reflects uniforms

scenes.nonClaim: Promotes only the registered SimpleRT descriptor-backed shader with reflected gColor uniform layout; arbitrary SkSL, unregistered effects, runtime-effect color filters, blenders, and image filters remain out of scope.
